title: Point IK Sample
description: A single Tier 1 point-IK benchmark sample reconstructed from benchmarks/point_ik/point_ik_v1.npz (one index across all arrays) plus its point_ik_manifest.csv row. Position unit: meter. Quaternion order: wxyz. q_initial/q_target are radians, shape [7]. target_position/target_quaternion are produced by forward kinematics of q_target, so every target is reachable by construction.

sample_id.description: Unique integer sample identifier (NPZ array index).

q_target.description: Goal joint configuration [q1..q7] in radians; target_position/target_quaternion are its forward-kinematics pose.

initial_position.description: End-effector position [x, y, z] in meters at q_initial, world frame.

initial_quaternion.description: End-effector orientation as a unit quaternion [w, x, y, z] at q_initial, world frame.

target_position.description: Target end-effector position [x, y, z] in meters, world frame (forward kinematics of q_target).

target_quaternion.description: Target end-effector orientation as a unit quaternion [w, x, y, z], world frame (forward kinematics of q_target).

position_distance_m.description: Euclidean distance between initial_position and target_position, meters.

orientation_distance_rad.description: SO(3) geodesic angle between initial and target orientation, radians, in [0, pi].

initial_sigma_min.description: Smallest singular value of the geometric Jacobian at q_initial.

target_sigma_min.description: Smallest singular value of the geometric Jacobian at q_target.

minimum_initial_limit_margin.description: Worst-case normalized operational joint-limit margin at q_initial (see kinematics.joint_limit_utils); >= 0 for a valid sample.

minimum_target_limit_margin.description: Worst-case normalized operational joint-limit margin at q_target; >= 0 for a valid sample.

source_seed.description: Deterministic seed tag recorded for this sample's difficulty group.
